---
title: "LA County Wildfire Risk"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(duckdb)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(mapgl)
library(htmlwidgets)

urls <- paste0(
  "https://data.source.coop/carbonplan/carbonplan-ocr/output/fire-risk/",
  "vector/production/v1.1.0/geoparquet/buildings.parquet/",
  "state_fips=06/county_fips=037/data_", 0:12, ".parquet"
)

urls_sql <- paste0("[", paste0("'", urls, "'", collapse = ", "), "]")

con <- duckdb::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), dbdir = ":memory:")
DBI::dbExecute(con, "INSTALL httpfs; LOAD httpfs;")
DBI::dbExecute(con, "INSTALL spatial; LOAD spatial;")

# Discover column names from schema
schema_df   <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf("DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet(%s)", urls_sql))
all_cols    <- schema_df$column_name
start_idx   <- which(all_cols == "rps_scott")
end_idx     <- which(all_cols == "bp_2047_riley")
target_cols <- all_cols[start_idx:end_idx]

# Read centroid lon/lat + risk columns — sample 100k rows to keep HTML size manageable
attr_sql <- paste(target_cols, collapse = ", ")
df <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ST_X(ST_Centroid(geometry)) AS lon,
          ST_Y(ST_Centroid(geometry)) AS lat,
          %s
   FROM read_parquet(%s)
   USING SAMPLE 100000 ROWS",
  attr_sql, urls_sql
))

DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)

# Build point sf from lon/lat columns
buildings_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(df, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)

# ── USDA burn probability from remote COG ───────────────────────────────────
# Credentials from credentials.json (gitignored — never committed).
# Key names match the Source Cooperative credentials JSON format.
creds <- jsonlite::fromJSON("credentials.json")
terra::setGDALconfig("AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID",     creds$credentials$aws_access_key_id)
terra::setGDALconfig("AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY", creds$credentials$aws_secret_access_key)
terra::setGDALconfig("AWS_SESSION_TOKEN",     creds$credentials$aws_session_token)
terra::setGDALconfig("AWS_REGION",            creds$credentials$region_name)
terra::setGDALconfig("AWS_VIRTUAL_HOSTING",   "FALSE")

cog_path <- "/vsis3/us-west-2.opendata.source.coop/espm-288/espm-288-testing/BP_CA_cog.tif"
cog <- terra::rast(cog_path)

# terra::extract does not reproject automatically — match CRS first
pts_vect <- terra::project(terra::vect(buildings_sf), terra::crs(cog))

# extract() returns data frame: col 1 = row ID, col 2 = raster value
usda_vals <- terra::extract(cog, pts_vect)
buildings_sf$usda_bp <- usda_vals[[2]]

# Append so stats, dropdown, and popup all pick it up automatically
target_cols <- c(target_cols, "usda_bp")
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Compute per-column min/max for the JS color scale
buildings_pts <- buildings_sf
stats_df <- buildings_pts |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarise(across(all_of(target_cols), list(
    min = ~min(., na.rm = TRUE),
    max = ~max(., na.rm = TRUE)
  )))

col_stats <- setNames(
  lapply(target_cols, function(col) list(
    min = stats_df[[paste0(col, "_min")]],
    max = stats_df[[paste0(col, "_max")]]
  )),
  target_cols
)
col_stats_json <- toJSON(col_stats, auto_unbox = TRUE)
cols_json      <- toJSON(target_cols)

# Initial color scale for the first column
first_col <- target_cols[1]
first_min <- col_stats[[first_col]]$min
first_max <- col_stats[[first_col]]$max
first_mid <- (first_min + first_max) / 2

m <- maplibre(
  style  = carto_style("positron"),
  center = c(-118.25, 34.05),
  zoom   = 9
) |>
  add_circle_layer(
    id     = "buildings",
    source = buildings_pts,
    circle_color = interpolate(
      column = first_col,
      values = c(first_min, first_mid, first_max),
      stops  = c("#1a9850", "#ffffbf", "#d73027")
    ),
    circle_radius       = 3,
    circle_opacity      = 0.7,
    circle_stroke_width = 0
  )

# Inject a dropdown that re-colors points on change via setPaintProperty
js_code <- sprintf('
function(el, x) {
  var map = this.getMap();
  var cols  = %s;
  var stats = %s;

  var wrapper = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper.style.cssText = [
    "position:absolute", "top:10px", "left:50px", "z-index:1000",
    "background:white", "padding:8px 12px", "border-radius:4px",
    "box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)", "font-family:sans-serif",
    "font-size:13px"
  ].join(";");

  var label = document.createElement("label");
  label.textContent = "Risk metric: ";

  var select = document.createElement("select");
  select.style.marginLeft = "6px";
  cols.forEach(function(col) {
    var opt = document.createElement("option");
    opt.value = col;
    opt.textContent = col;
    select.appendChild(opt);
  });

  function updateLayer(col) {
    var s = stats[col];
    var mid = (s.min + s.max) / 2;
    map.setPaintProperty("buildings", "circle-color", [
      "interpolate", ["linear"], ["get", col],
      s.min, "#1a9850",
      mid,   "#ffffbf",
      s.max, "#d73027"
    ]);
  }

  select.addEventListener("change", function() { updateLayer(select.value); });

  wrapper.appendChild(label);
  wrapper.appendChild(select);
  el.appendChild(wrapper);

  // Click popup: show all risk fields for the clicked building
  map.on("click", "buildings", function(e) {
    if (!e.features || !e.features.length) return;
    var props = e.features[0].properties;

    var rows = cols.map(function(col) {
      var val = props[col];
      var display = (val !== null && val !== undefined) ? parseFloat(val).toFixed(4) : "N/A";
      return "<tr>" +
        "<td style=\\"padding:2px 10px 2px 0;font-weight:bold;white-space:nowrap\\">" + col + "</td>" +
        "<td style=\\"padding:2px 0;text-align:right\\">" + display + "</td>" +
        "</tr>";
    }).join("");

    var html = "<div style=\\"font-family:sans-serif;font-size:12px;max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto\\">" +
      "<table style=\\"border-collapse:collapse\\">" + rows + "</table></div>";

    new maplibregl.Popup({ maxWidth: "280px" })
      .setLngLat(e.lngLat)
      .setHTML(html)
      .addTo(map);
  });

  map.on("mouseenter", "buildings", function() {
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "pointer";
  });
  map.on("mouseleave", "buildings", function() {
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = "";
  });
}
', cols_json, col_stats_json)

final_map <- m |> onRender(js_code)
final_map
```
